chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-2810 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 28.08.2025 Mr. Abdul Gharoor Rind, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Ali Hyder Saleem, APG Sindh. Counsel for the Petitioner under instructions does not press the instant petition and submits that since the CNS Act has been amended and proviso for bail has also been inserted in the Act, therefore, he will approach the trail Court for grant of bail. The instant petition is disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Farooq PS
